recommendations.title: The Apple Dumpling Gang

recommendations.title: Candleshoe
recommendations.overview: When ex-con artist Harry claims that a secret treasure is hidden inside Candleshoe, an English estate, he creates an elaborate plan to find and steal the prize. By convincing a girl named Casey to impersonate the estate owner's long-lost granddaughte

recommendations.title: Love, Simon
recommendations.overview: Everyone deserves a great love story, but for 17-year-old Simon Spier, it's a little more complicated. He hasn't told his family or friends that he's gay, and he doesn't know the identity of the anonymous classmate that he's fallen for online.

recommendations.title: Network
recommendations.overview: When veteran anchorman Howard Beale is forced to retire his 25-year post because of his age, he announces to viewers that he will kill himself during his farewell broadcast. Network executives rethink their decision when his fanatical tirade results

recommendations.title: Chestnut: Hero of Central Park
recommendations.overview: Ray and Sal, two orphaned sisters, adopt and hide a Great Dane puppy from their two adopted parents living in a luxury downtown New York apartment that expressely forbids dogs.

recommendations.title: PAW Patrol: The Mighty Movie
recommendations.overview: A magical meteor crash lands in Adventure City and gives the PAW Patrol pups superpowers, transforming them into The Mighty Pups.

recommendations.title: Don't Think Twice
recommendations.overview: An improv group deals with several crises, including the loss of their lease and one member hitting the big time.

recommendations.title: Boiling Point
recommendations.overview: A head chef balances multiple personal and professional crises at a popular restaurant in London.
